response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the core stack requirements. While his background leans toward senior/lead roles and his recent work involves advanced topics (AI agents, Kubernetes, Dlang), his hands-on contributions to scalable platforms and pragmatic problem-solving suggest strong adaptability. The primary concerns are his overqualification for a junior/mid-level role and limited direct PostgreSQL exposure, but these are outweighed by his technical breadth and industry experience.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and Node.js proficiency with React experience, matching core stack requirements
Extensive full-stack development with scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation, Geo-Data platform)
Proven ability to learn quickly and contribute to complex projects (AI agents, Kubernetes, low-latency systems)
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, which may lead to role mismatch or dissatisfaction
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (primarily MongoDB and SQL; no explicit PostgreSQL mention)
High seniority may not align with the entry-level expectations for progressive responsibility
